top_items.title: AI Coding Tools for Knowledge Work: What Executives Need to Know
top_items.one_liner: Executives are wrong to dismiss Claude Code and agentic coding tools as dev-only — this piece explains the knowledge-work productivity case.

top_items.title: Anthropic launches a multi-agent code review tool for Claude Code
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic adds multi-agent code review to Claude Code, raising the bar for AI-assisted software quality at scale.

top_items.title: The technical leap where most brilliant AI initiatives spectacularly fail
top_items.one_liner: Most AI initiatives stall at the production leap — this diagnoses the organisational and technical failure points.
